recommended_action: Never share OTP codes passwords or banking credentials
Contact the bank through its official application or published phone number

warning_sign: Requests an unexpected parcel release fee
recommended_action: Verify the parcel through the courier official application or website

warning_sign: Threatens immediate arrest or legal action
recommended_action: Contact the relevant authority using independently verified contact information
Pause and verify the recipient through a separate trusted channel

warning_sign: Requests installation of a remote access application
recommended_action: Do not install remote access software for an unknown sender

warning_sign: Requests payment before an interview or job offer
recommended_action: Verify the employer independently and do not pay an advance fee

warning_sign: Uses a suspicious or mismatched web address
recommended_action: Do not open the link and locate the organisation website independently
